Prep time: about 12 minutes.
Equipment: toaster, nonstick skillet, bowl, fork or whisk, knife, plate.

This breakfast gives you crisp salmon-avocado toast, soft eggs, and a cool yogurt bowl for a balanced, savory start to the day.

1. Toast the wholegrain bread until golden.
2. Mash the avocado with lemon juice, salt, and black pepper, then spread it over the toast and top with smoked salmon.
3. Whisk the egg, liquid egg whites, chives, salt, and black pepper. Cook gently in a nonstick skillet until softly set.
4. Stir the yogurt with cinnamon and top with walnuts.
5. Plate everything together and eat right away.

Storage: Keep the components separate in the fridge and assemble fresh. The toast is best eaten immediately, and the eggs can be reheated gently if needed.

Tip: Keep the avocado layer thin so the toast stays crisp, and add the yogurt bowl last so the walnuts stay crunchy.
